outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Iran war news as US searches for crew member from downed F-15; strike hits near nuclear plant
outlets.summary: CNN covers the ongoing search for a downed US F-15E crew member in Iran, the 4th strike on Bushehr Nuclear Plant, and Trump's 48-hour ultimatum.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump's Iran war is one big own goal; Trump sells war as economic fallout tests him ahead of midterms
outlets.summary: WaPo opinion criticizes Trump's Iran war strategy as counterproductive. Separate reporting on how gas prices and economic fallout threaten his midterm prospects.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Iran war enters its 6th week as military searches for downed jet crew member
outlets.summary: NPR reports on Day 36 of the conflict, the missing F-15E weapons systems officer, and Trump's record $1.5T defense budget request.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran war latest: Trump gives Iran 48 hours before 'all Hell will reign down'
outlets.summary: Fox covers Trump's ultimatum to Iran with the April 6 deadline. Graham backs Trump's threat of overwhelming force.

outlets.name: Fox News (Opinion)
outlets.headline: Iran war opens new front tied to U.S. domestic fraud and migration
outlets.summary: Fox opinion argues the Iran war connects to domestic security and immigration issues.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Trump issues Hormuz deadline, search for US airman continues
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera liveblog covers Day 36: Trump ultimatum, Bushehr nuclear plant strike, Mahshahr petrochemical zone, Hezbollah counterattacks.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera (Analysis)
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 36 of US-Israeli attacks?
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera daily explainer summarizing Day 36 developments across all fronts.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Trump warns Iran: 48 hours to 'make a deal, open Hormuz' or 'all hell' will rain down
outlets.summary: ToI covers Trump's ultimatum, IDF's 70+ strikes on Iran, and 5 IRGC commanders killed in Beirut Ramada Hotel strike.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Why Israelis Are Losing Faith in the Iran War; Top Court Orders Police to Allow Anti-War Protests
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports on declining Israeli public support (45.5%) and Supreme Court president ordering police to allow anti-war demonstrations.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran warns of radioactive catastrophe after 4th attack on Bushehr nuclear plant
outlets.summary: Press TV covers FM Araghchi's warning that attacks on Bushehr could cause radioactive fallout affecting GCC capitals.

outlets.name: Tasnim News
outlets.headline: US-Israeli strikes hit petrochemical plants in southern Iran
outlets.summary: Tasnim reports 6 petrochemical plants struck in Mahshahr, with 5 injuries. All personnel evacuated.
